$comment: Edit this in the real north-star repo. Paths resolve relative to the north-star repo root (where this file lives), or may be absolute. Each target has a `role` (substrate|brand|legacy) that selects the tailored block in agent/blocks/. `branch` is informational (the real repos use 'master' except tali-platform on 'main'). 'northStarRef' is the human/agent-facing pointer embedded in each block.
